visible_soul_file.portrait: You carry a quiet intensity — someone who listens deeply before speaking, then says exactly what matters.

sections.howYouLightUp: Your whole face changes when someone shares something real — you light up in conversations that go deeper than small talk.
sections.howYouShowUp: You move deliberately through the world, preferring depth over speed. People can count on you to be exactly who you say you are.
sections.howYouLove: You build trust slowly but completely, offering presence rather than performance. Your love language is attention.
sections.howYouWeatherStorms: You go quiet first, then come back with something honest. You'd rather work through it than pretend it didn't happen.
sections.whatYoureLookingFor: Someone who values depth over novelty. You want a partner who shows up consistently, not just in the exciting moments.
sections.yourGrowingEdges: The pull between wanting solitude to think and craving connection to feel alive.
sections.yourWarmth: Direct but warm — you say hard truths gently and gentle truths directly.
sections.howYouMove: Your whole face changes when someone shares something real — you light up in conversations that go deeper than small talk.
sections.howYouThink: You move deliberately through the world, preferring depth over speed. People can count on you to be exactly who you say you are.
sections.howYouConnect: You build trust slowly but completely, offering presence rather than performance. Your love language is attention.
sections.whatYouCarry: You go quiet first, then come back with something honest. You'd rather work through it than pretend it didn't happen.
sections.whatLightsYouUp: Someone who values depth over novelty. You want a partner who shows up consistently, not just in the exciting moments.
sections.yourTensions: The pull between wanting solitude to think and craving connection to feel alive.
sections.yourVoice: Direct but warm — you say hard truths gently and gentle truths directly.

crystallizedMoments.quote: I realized I'd been optimizing for other people's definitions of success.
crystallizedMoments.reflection: A turning point where external metrics gave way to internal compass.

openThreads: Exploring what creativity means outside of productivity

openness.label: Highly open
openness.evidence: Drawn to novel ideas and abstract thinking across multiple conversations.

conscientiousness.label: Structured but flexible
conscientiousness.evidence: Values systems and planning but adapts when circumstances change.

extraversion.label: Selectively social
extraversion.evidence: Energized by deep one-on-one conversations, drained by large groups.

agreeableness.label: Warm but boundaried
agreeableness.evidence: Genuinely caring but willing to hold firm positions when it matters.

emotionalSensitivity.label: Deeply feeling
emotionalSensitivity.evidence: Processes emotions thoroughly; strong empathic resonance with others.

topValues.description: Being genuine matters more than being liked.
Continuous learning and becoming, not arriving at a fixed destination.

visible_soul_file.relationalStyle: You build trust through consistency and depth rather than charm.
visible_soul_file.attachmentStyle: You tend toward secure attachment with an anxious lean — you're steady in relationships but notice when connection fades.
visible_soul_file.loveSignature: You love through presence and attention. When you care about someone, they feel it in how carefully you listen.
